title: Iron railing optimization for Fabulously Optimized
description: for Fabulously Optimized and some modules that cause the railing material to flicker,Removed the ground material from the bars without overlapping with the square material underneath to cause flickering
body: In response to Fabulously Optimized and some modules that were causing the railing material to flicker, the ground material on the railing was removed so that it didn't overlap the square material underneath, which was causing flickering
